title: PSR
description: Generates dense unrelated concept triplets and logs how AI systems define, bridge, cite, splice, or hallucinate.

title: AWD
description: One-sentence-in, bounded-answer-out tool for deleting AI waste without threads or drift.

title: Zero-Waste Router
description: Routes messy AI/browser work into cleaner downstream output paths.

title: Aster Graf
description: Explore a deliberately simplified family map rendered as a constellation. Aster means star; graf means graph.

title: Fungi Cell Map
description: Inspect connected compartments, phase states, and hyphal flux in an interactive systems map.

title: Saperli Popette
description: A weird, unpredictable French conversation partner. Mon ami, bienvenue!
